prompt: Create a row of 3 stat cards. Each card has a header with a muted label (e.g., 'Revenue', 'Users', 'Orders'), a body with a large display number (e.g., '$48,200', '12,340', '1,893'), and a badge showing a trend percentage (e.g., '+12%' success, '+8%' success, '-3%' danger). Use Row to lay out the three cards horizontally.
reference:
import { Row } from '@tale-ui/react/row';
import { Card } from '@tale-ui/react/card';
import { Text } from '@tale-ui/react/text';
import { Badge } from '@tale-ui/react/badge';
import { Column } from '@tale-ui/react/column';

export function DataDisplayCards() {
  return (
    <Row gap="l">
      <Card.Root>
        <Card.Header>
          <Text variant="label" size="m" color="muted">Revenue</Text>
        </Card.Header>
        <Card.Body>
          <Column gap="s">
            <Text variant="display" size="m">$48,200</Text>
            <Badge variant="success">+12%</Badge>
          </Column>
        </Card.Body>
      </Card.Root>
      <Card.Root>
        <Card.Header>
          <Text variant="label" size="m" color="muted">Users</Text>
        </Card.Header>
        <Card.Body>
          <Column gap="s">
            <Text variant="display" size="m">12,340</Text>
            <Badge variant="success">+8%</Badge>
          </Column>
        </Card.Body>
      </Card.Root>
      <Card.Root>
        <Card.Header>
          <Text variant="label" size="m" color="muted">Orders</Text>
        </Card.Header>
        <Card.Body>
          <Column gap="s">
            <Text variant="display" size="m">1,893</Text>
            <Badge variant="error">-3%</Badge>
          </Column>
        </Card.Body>
      </Card.Root>
    </Row>
  );
}
